# tf_module_publish

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Publish modules to Terraform Registry (HCP/TFE).

```starlark
load("@rules_tf2//tf2:def.bzl", "tf_module_publish")

tf_module_publish(
    name = "publish",
    module = ":my_module",
    organization = "my-org",
    namespace = "my-namespace",
)
```

See [Publishing Overview](README.md) for more information.
